review_title: Easy to use, reliable, and awesome support team
description: They team continuously update the software and listens to their customer.
author: Angelo J.
pros: Easy to implement and dashboard is very helpful.
cons: Issues are not currently aggregated and makes it hard to close if there are many instances of the same issue. Our team have automate this since it takes time to close everything.

review_title: Bugfender is a must to have solution.
description: We're very satisfied with the platform—it has significantly improved our troubleshooting process. The dashboard is user-friendly and provides all the key information we need at a glance. Previously, we stored logs on our own servers, and during service issues, accessing them was often impossible, making troubleshooting quite difficult. With Bugfender, that experience has dramatically improved.
author: Vardan K.
pros: We really appreciate how well the logs are structured, and the offline caching has been incredibly useful. As a construction-focused mobile software company, many of our job sites are in remote areas where internet connectivity is limited or completely unavailable.
cons: The pricing structure jumps from 1 million to 5 million. I wish there was a tier in between.

author: Mohammad F.
pros: It's very easy to setup and use It's very fast and you can see the logs on the server side very quickly and help you to find the root cause.
cons: you can't disable it in specific ViewController or ... ( imaging the user enter the sensitive information and you don't want to send them to the server ( PinCode and ...) but every time as you are using swizzling and ... can't disable it per ViewController or other places. the search is one of the main functionalities on these tools but really it's not powerful and I identified a bug and reported it about search with string + numbers but I waste my time to follow up and it was hard to talk and educate the support team. also I noticed the iOS/Android logo doesn't show correctly on the dashboard last but not least, we need search on the contents of the issue too, not only the logs!

author: Alon R.
pros: 1. I like that I can view my own logs that I placed in the code. 2. The option to "filter by" is great. 3. There is a significant improvement in performance. 4. There is a significant improvement in UI.
cons: 1. The crash report "filter by" is very limited. 2. The crashes usually don't say much, it's very hard to investigate, understand the origin of the crash and how to resolve. 3. The overall performance of the logs and crashes can improve significantly. 4. The "filter by" version has duplication and not working as expected, especially in the crash report. 5. Sometimes it takes time until the logs appear in the web view. 6. When you go into a certain log you have to scroll a lot to get more information. 7. When you download a log it's not understandable how much of the entire log will be downloaded. 8. How can I resolve a crash and not see it anymore? * The most important thing is that I'm working with another "crash report" tool - Raygun, and we have very different crashes there and much less, so now I'm not even sure that everything in your crash report is indeed a crash. for instance, in Raygun, I can get 2-5 crashes in a certain week and your report will say that I've got a few hundred.

review_title: Easy way to have remote logging
description: I'd still recommend it's use in every project that has the need for remote logging.
author: Pedro V.
pros: I really like how it was simple to add to the app, and simples to use for simple cases.
cons: Searching and filtering logs is not as powerful as it could be.

review_title: Nice features but could be improved
author: Gisela F.
pros: The most useful feature of the software is the filtering. It allows you to customize the filtering of the search which makes it easier to find the phone bugs you are looking for.
cons: The logs are hard to read on the web. I usually download the text file and open it in my machine. It will be nice to have a search bar on the logs. It is nice that you can do the filtering by log level but I think it should also have more features so that we can debug the logs in the Web UI itself.

review_title: Not bad for the price, but log exploration is clunky
description: We use Bugfender to capture logs on our apps, to then track issues in production. The product provides a nice set of features for the price, but the web interface is clunky and search (the single most important feature for a remote log explorer) is quite bad, slow and limited.
author: André N.
pros: - provides native SDKs - easy to set up - nice set of features
cons: - log exploration/search is limited and not very good - SDK's lack customization - web interface is slow and clunky (even the new one)

author: Liam K.
pros: Very easy to use and integrate into app Excellent support
cons: Loss of ability to see OS and app version on device at the time that logs were generated Have been throttled at times due to exceeding daily usage but never very clear which specific restriction had been exceeded/

description: I think it’s helped the quality of our game.
author: David D.
pros: During development, getting information in near-real time about bugs was super useful. And since players tend not to remember all their steps, being able to see what they were doing before a crash has helped a lot.
cons: UI could be a little more centered towards actual tasks (such as not auto-refreshing an archived log).

review_title: We love the platform, keep up with new features!
author: Hristian A.
pros: We love the platform, you know your strengths, no need to state again.
cons: Overall, the delivers what it is supposed to, some additional few features would be highly appreciated: • Querying the logs in general, not within the context of one selected device/instance would be extremely useful • Ability to aggregate some of the data - enhancements with minor reporting capabilities. • Notifications (email, sms) when certain events (logs) occur, or when certain events (logs) pass trough certain threshold There were few occasions, where the platform crashed all-together, which is highly undesired...

description: Very happy that I found it!
author: Joe K.
pros: Integration was VERY easy, it automatically collects most things I'm interested in tracking, updates almost instantly, and the interface is fairly easy to navigate
cons: The overall analytics don't always line up with other analytics I use, sometimes I can't find what I'm looking for, and the search/filter doesn't seem to work right

description: Fantastic. It's helped us to debug so many mysterious issues that were happening in our mobile app.
author: Matt H.
pros: Real-time logs from a device. Real-time usage of our app. We could watch logs happen in real-time for any given user.
cons: Hard to search for specific things in logs

review_title: Great cloud logging solution for mobile
description: A great cloud logging solution for mobile apps which comes with a hefty price tag.
author: David K.
pros: Very easy to implement and just works! The dashboard is a great tool to view logs almost in realtime. It's also nice to see what the activity state changes were combined with the logging.
cons: The price is quite hefty for small app developers. The paid program also doesn't allow multiple team members. Also not being able to turn off the logging from a client side is a pity.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: With Bugfender, we can easily access detailed logs from any user who has signed up or logged into our apps. Getting support requests by email and then looking up the details in Bugfender logs is very helpful when troubleshooting.
author: John M.
pros: Easy of implemention (took little time to get started) and ease of use (it's very intuitive to use). Their support is also VERY responsive and knowledgeable.
cons: The pricing is a little bit steep at scale but it's worth it.

author: Juan Manuel O.
pros: The most interesting feature is that you can have logs of the users in real-time, checking bugs etc. Regarding the integration and the usability is was very to integrate into our apps, and we get good very good support.
cons: After having been using the product for a long time I can say that it is a good product

author: ed P.
pros: Very useful being able to see linear logs for a mobile app. Without them you're flying blind.
cons: I'd like a couple of additional features. The ability to jump to the beginning of the logs and better filtering. Also there's too big a difference between the pricing tiers. I'd like to add additional users but not at an extra €100 a month.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Weighting out the pros and cons I have experienced with Bugfender, the conclusion is that it is getting more in my way than what it is actually helping me. So, overall the balance is negative, as it is damaging my productivity just because they are too insistent on being reviewed. Hope you can now stop asking for it for some time at least.
author: Juan F.
pros: The fact that I am capable of reading logs from remote devices is great. The product is very well done and easy to use.
cons: I have been a user for just a week and I have spent more time dealing with requests to review the product than actually using it. It is quite annoying.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great way to get remote logs for native apps even if the tooling is slow
description: Bugfender has allowed us to discover why certain bugs occur in the wild that are difficult to reproduce during development, it has been a great tool.
author: Matt M.
pros: It is nice to find a tool that will allow you to log everything to a remote place and that you can access those logs from the web.
cons: The web interface often feels slow and clunky

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use and easy to integrate in the workflow
cons: Could have an extended free trial period
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Rodolfo J.
pros: Simple implementation and very intuitive
cons: Slow filters on searching in fairly long logs
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Carlos M.
pros: I've used for android and iOS and the best thing here was how easy it was to implement. Compared with other solutions it was out of the box to have everything working as expected.
cons: No big problems here. To be honest I really liked it as an alternative for other alternatives that I was testing. The reason why we decided not to renew the trial was just to avoid an extra expense on the project.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Lee B.
pros: Gives me insight into how often specific bugs are happening and seeing which specific users are having the issue.
cons: Could use a better dashboard to highlight major bugs.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
